summary: Comprehensive testing of final polish features completed. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: WhatsApp share button, PDF download with correct labels, 'Agent is thinking...' text with tool progress indicator, blue ticks on user messages, mic recording-pulse animation, Hindi voice button, eligibility cards with पात्र/अपात्र badges, DEMO mode triggers (beta/10th/scholarship), PDF with DD/MM/YYYY Hindi date format.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/auth/send-otp returns success for valid phone ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/send-otp returns 400 for invalid phone ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/verify-otp with otp=1234 returns user_id (24-char ObjectId) ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/verify-otp with wrong OTP returns failure ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/chat with 'namaste' triggers profiler asking name in Hindi ✓
BACKEND: Full profiler flow (namaste→name→age→income→state) works correctly ✓
BACKEND: Profile completion triggers eligibility + tool_progress + pdf_url ✓
BACKEND: Vidyasiri shows FIRST and eligible for income < 150000 + Karnataka ✓
BACKEND: Vidyasiri shows ineligible for income > 150000 ✓
BACKEND: DEMO_MODE 'beta' trigger returns instant Vidyasiri eligible + PDF ✓
BACKEND: DEMO_MODE '10th' trigger returns instant result + PDF ✓
BACKEND: DEMO_MODE 'scholarship' trigger returns instant result + PDF ✓
BACKEND: GET /api/pdf/{id} returns valid PDF file (application/pdf, %PDF magic bytes) ✓
BACKEND: GET /api/pdf/invalid-id returns 404 ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/search-schemes returns Document scanned format ✓
BACKEND: GET /api/schemes returns 3 seeded schemes ✓
BACKEND: PDF contains DD/MM/YYYY date format (verified: 21/02/2026) ✓
BACKEND: bot_message contains tool_progress with 3 Hindi steps ✓
FRONTEND: Login page loads with phone + OTP flow ✓
FRONTEND: OTP 1234 verification works ✓
FRONTEND: Chat page navigation works ✓
FRONTEND: WhatsApp share button visible with data-testid='whatsapp-share-btn' ✓
FRONTEND: WhatsApp button shows 'WhatsApp पर शेयर करें' + 'Share on WhatsApp' ✓
FRONTEND: PDF download button shows 'PDF डाउनलोड करें' + 'Pre-filled Application Form' ✓
FRONTEND: Eligibility cards display पात्र (eligible) badges ✓
FRONTEND: Blue ticks visible on user messages (status=read after bot reply) ✓
FRONTEND: Hindi voice button visible on bot messages ✓
FRONTEND: MCP tool trace displayed ✓
FRONTEND: Mic button has 'recording-pulse' animation class in CSS ✓
FRONTEND: Tool progress indicator has 'Agent is thinking...' text (data-testid='agent-thinking-text') ✓
FRONTEND: Tool progress shows Hindi text: विद्यासिरी छात्रवृत्ति PDF पढ़ रहे हैं..., etc. ✓
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
WhatsAppShareBtn component correctly placed next to PDF download button
TickStatus component correctly shows blue ticks (CheckCheck with blue color) for status='read'
ToolProgressIndicator shows 'Agent is thinking...' text with saffron spinner
recording-pulse animation defined in index.css for mic button
PDF generator uses DD/MM/YYYY format (date_str = now.strftime('%d/%m/%Y'))
Income compared as YEARLY (not monthly) in eligibility rules
seed_data_creation: Tests use timestamp-based phone numbers to create fresh users each run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified all final polish features. WhatsApp share button appears next to PDF download with correct data-testid. 'Agent is thinking...' text shows with saffron spinner during tool progress. Blue ticks appear on user messages after bot reply. Mic button has recording-pulse animation in CSS. PDF shows DD/MM/YYYY Hindi date format. DEMO_MODE triggers work for 'beta', '10th', 'scholarship'. All backend APIs working correctly.
